mano_cua.result_summary: 编辑器中图形加载代码全部被注释掉（script.src = photobooth.json.js 等），界面只显示autolayout按钮和空白画布，无法通过UI加载包含groups/ports/input-output节点的图形。photobooth.json.js文件存在且包含正确数据但未被加载。无法验证autolayout功能。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: All graph-loading JavaScript code in index.html is commented out, leaving the editor non-functional. The photobooth.json.js file exists with correct data (groups, inports, outports, processes) but is not loaded. No UI mechanism to open/load a graph. Autolayout button has no effect on empty canvas.
